zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Button於1407年出生在威爾士格拉莫爾根聖 萊森斯時，她的父親Thomas Botton36歲，母親Gwenilian verch Hywel27歲。她於大約1422年與Sir Morgan ap Howell of Lanishen在威爾士格拉莫爾根利亞尼申結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1440年享年33歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Button于1407年出生在威尔士格拉莫爾根聖 萊森斯时，她的父亲Thomas Botton36岁，母亲Gwenilian verch Hywel27岁。她于大约1422年与Sir Morgan ap Howell of Lanishen在威尔士格拉莫爾根利亞尼申结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1440年享年33岁。

nameMeanings.name: Button
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: metonymic occupational name for a maker or seller of buttons, from Old French bo(u)ton ‘knob, lump’, specialized to mean ‘button’. Compare Butner .
habitational name from Booton in Norfolk, named with either the Old English personal name Bōta or the Old Norse personal name Bō + tūn ‘settlement’.

variants.name: Booton
meanings: habitational name, probably from a place in Norfolk named Booton, from an Old English personal name (Bōta or Bō) + tūn ‘settlement’. The present-day concentration of the surname is in the West Midlands and Wales.

variants.name: Botten
meanings: Norwegian: habitational name from any of various farms named Botn, Botten, or Botnen, from Old Norse botn ‘small valley, valley end’. Compare Botner .

variants.name: Booten
meanings: English: variant of   Button  . Compare   Booton  .
In some cases possibly also Dutch and North German: patronymic from a short form of the ancient Germanic personal name   Bodo  . This surname is rare in the Netherlands and Germany.

variants.name: Butner
meanings: English (Durham): occupational name of Norman origin from Old French botonier ‘button maker’, from bo(u)ton ‘knob, lump’, specialized to mean ‘button’.
In some cases also German (mainly Bütner): very rare variant of Büttner (see Buettner ) and, in North America, probably also an altered form of this.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Button was born in 1407, in Saint Lythans, Glamorgan, Wales, her father, Thomas Botton, was 36 and her mother, Gwenilian verch Hywel, was 27. She married Sir Morgan ap Howell of Lanishen about 1422, in Llanishen, Glamorgan, Wales. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1440, at the age of 33.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Button est née en 1407, à Saint Lythans, Glamorgan, Galles, son père, Thomas Botton, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Gwenilian verch Hywel, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Morgan ap Howell of Lanishen environ 1422, à Llanishen, Glamorgan, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1440, à l’âge de 33 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Button 1407 in Saint Lythans, Glamorgan, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Botton 36 und ihre Mutter Gwenilian verch Hywel 27. Sie hat um 1422 in Llanishen, Glamorgan, Wales Sir Morgan ap Howell of Lanishen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1440 im Alter von 33 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Button è nata il nel 1407 nel Saint Lythans, Glamorgan, Galles, sua padre, Thomas Botton, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Gwenilian verch Hywel, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Sir Morgan ap Howell of Lanishen circa 1422, nel Llanishen, Glamorgan, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1440, all'età di 33 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Buttonが1407年にウェールズグラモーガンサイント リサンスで生まれた時，父Thomas Bottonは36歳，母Gwenilian verch Hywelは27歳であった。約1422年にウェールズグラモーガンラニシェンでSir Morgan ap Howell of Lanishenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1440年に33歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Button(이)가 1407년 웨일스 글램르건 세인트 리스아스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Botton(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gwenilian verch Hywel(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 대략 1422년 웨일스 글램르건 랜이셰에서 Sir Morgan ap Howell of Lanishen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1440년 33세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Button nasceu em 1407, em Saint Lythans, Glamorgan, Gales, seu pai, Thomas Botton, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Gwenilian verch Hywel, tinha 27 anos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Button родилась в 1407 г. в местности сеинт литанс, глэморган, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Thomas Botton было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Gwenilian verch Hywel, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Morgan ap Howell of Lanishen около 1422 г. в местности лланишен, глэморган, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1440 г. в возрасте 33 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Button nació en 1407, en Saint Lythans, Glamorgan, Gales, su papá, Thomas Botton, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Gwenilian verch Hywel, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Sir Morgan ap Howell of Lanishen aproximadamente 1422, en Llanishen, Glamorgan, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1440, a la edad de 33 años.
